summary: Designing, planting, and maintaining gardens and green spaces for residential and commercial clients.
bullets: Install and arrange plants, trees, and features to bring landscape designs to life.
Maintain gardens through pruning, watering, soil care, and seasonal upkeep.
Advise clients on plant selection and long-term care for healthy, sustainable gardens.

summary: Hands-on agricultural and field work supporting day-to-day operations.
bullets: Carried out planting, cultivation, and general field tasks in outdoor conditions.
Worked reliably as part of a team to meet daily targets.

summary: Helping plan and run community events, including the Phnom Penh Houseplant Festival.
bullets: Coordinated logistics and on-the-day operations for community events.
Acted as moderator and emcee, engaging audiences and keeping programs on schedule.

summary: Coaching young players through a sport-for-development program.
bullets: Led training sessions building teamwork, discipline, and life skills for youth.
Mentored players and supported their personal growth on and off the field.
